data.title: Q4 Results Live: ITC Hotels, PB Fintech, Godrej Industries among 135 companies announcing March quarter earnings today
data.description: Q4 Results 2025 Live: Around 135 companies are announcing their results for the January-March quarter of the financial year 2025. Abbott India, Allied Blenders and Distillers, Balrampur Chini Mills, Bikaji Foods International, CESC, Cochin Shipyard, Godfrey Phillips India, Godrej Industries, ITC Hotels, JSW Energy, Kaynes Technology, LT Foods, NCC, Orient Technologies, Patanjali Foods, PB Fintech (Policybazaar), Saregama India, South Indian Bank, Spencers Retail and Zee Learn are some of the notable names among them.

data.title: JSW Steel Shares Surge Over 3% in Today's Session
data.description:
Disclaimer This is an AI-assisted live blog with updates sourced from multiple news outlets and agencies Disclaimer

JSW Steel shares are trading higher by 3.04% at Rs 1019.40 in today's session, marking a significant increase in price. This movement positions JSW Steel among the top gainers within the NIFTY 50 STOCKS.

The bullish sentiment around the stock is further supported by recent analysis from Moneycontrol as of May 12, 2025.

Financial Performance


The financial data reveals the company's revenue and net profit trends over the recent years and quarters.

Consolidated Revenue:

  • Annual: Revenue has increased consistently from Rs 73,326.00 Cr in 2020 to Rs 175,006.00 Cr in 2024.
  • Quarterly: Revenue was Rs 41,378.00 Cr in December 2024, compared to Rs 41,940.00 Cr in December 2023.

Consolidated Net Profit:
  • Annual: Net profit showed variance, with Rs 4,009.00 Cr in 2020, peaking at Rs 20,021.00 Cr in 2022, and settling at Rs 9,145.00 Cr in 2024.
  • Quarterly: Net profit was Rs 713.00 Cr in December 2024, significantly lower than Rs 2,466.00 Cr in December 2023.

Earnings Per Share (EPS):
  • Annual: EPS increased from Rs 16.78 in 2020 to Rs 36.34 in 2024.
  • Quarterly: EPS was Rs 2.94 in December 2024, compared to Rs 9.92 in December 2023.

Balance Sheet Highlights


The consolidated balance sheet reflects the company's financial structure and key metrics:
  • Share Capital: Increased marginally from Rs 301 Cr in 2020 to Rs 341 Cr in 2024.
  • Reserves & Surplus: Increased from Rs 36,298 Cr in 2020 to Rs 77,364 Cr in 2024.
  • Total Assets: Increased from Rs 131,820 Cr in 2020 to Rs 228,198 Cr in 2024.

Cash Flow Analysis


The consolidated cash flow statement provides insights into the company's cash inflows and outflows:
  • Net Cash Flow: Fluctuated over the years, with a net cash flow of -Rs 7,394 Cr in March 2024.
  • Cash Flow from Operating Activities: Rs 12,078 Cr in March 2024.

Key Financial Ratios


Key financial ratios provide a deeper understanding of JSW Steel's performance:
  • Debt to Equity: The Debt to Equity ratio is 1.10 in Mar 2024.
  • Return on Equity (ROE): The Return on Equity is 11.34% in Mar 2024.

JSW Steel's financial performance showcases consistent revenue growth, although net profit and EPS have seen some variability in recent quarters. The company maintains a robust balance sheet with increasing reserves and assets. With JSW Steel's shares currently trading higher, the market's response aligns with positive sentiment and the company's overall financial health.
data.author: MoneyControl

data.title: Top Midcap Gainers: Apar Ind, Linde India, Coromandel stocks lead gains on Nifty Midcap 150 today
data.description:
Disclaimer This is an AI-assisted live blog with updates sourced from multiple news outlets and agencies Disclaimer

During today's session, the NIFTY MIDCAP 150 saw notable gains among several stocks, with Apar Ind, Linde India, and Coromandel Int leading the pack. This performance reflects the market's ongoing dynamics and investor reactions to various sector-specific and broader economic factors.

Among the top gainers in the NIFTY MIDCAP 150, Apar Ind recorded a gain of 8.9% to reach Rs 7,544.00, Linde India increased by 4.98% to Rs 7,174.50, and Coromandel Int rose by 3.9% to Rs 2,497.00. Other significant gainers include Cochin Shipyard, which saw an increase of 2.73% to Rs 1,745.80, and KPIT Tech, which gained 2.37% to reach Rs 1,383.50.

data.title: Hero Motocorp Shares Soar 2.65% in Today's Session
data.description:
Disclaimer This is an AI-assisted live blog with updates sourced from multiple news outlets and agencies Disclaimer

Hero Motocorp's stock is trading higher in today's session, gaining 2.65% to reach Rs 4175.00. This increase reflects positive movement for the stock during the current trading session.

The stock is included in the NIFTY 50 STOCKS index, indicating its significance in the Indian market. As of today's session, Hero Motocorp shows a notable upward trend.

Financial Performance


Recent financial data provides insights into Hero Motocorp's performance. Here's a summary of the company's consolidated financial results:

Quarterly Results:

  • March 2025: Revenue stood at Rs 9,969.81 Cr, with a Net Profit of Rs 1,097.71 Cr and an EPS of Rs 58.08.
  • December 2024: Revenue was Rs 10,259.89 Cr, with a Net Profit of Rs 1,200.12 Cr and an EPS of Rs 55.38.
  • September 2024: Revenue reached Rs 10,482.93 Cr, with a Net Profit of Rs 1,152.75 Cr and an EPS of Rs 53.19.

Annual Results:
  • March 2025: Revenue totaled Rs 40,923.42 Cr, with a Net Profit of Rs 4,536.93 Cr and an EPS of Rs 218.96.
  • March 2024: Revenue was Rs 37,788.62 Cr, with a Net Profit of Rs 3,862.41 Cr and an EPS of Rs 187.36.
  • March 2023: Revenue was Rs 34,158.38 Cr, with a Net Profit of Rs 2,796.79 Cr and an EPS of Rs 140.62.

Cash Flow:
  • The cash flow from operating activities for March 2025 stood at Rs 4,297 Cr.

Balance Sheet:
  • As of March 2025, the Share Capital was Rs 40 Cr and Reserves & Surplus amounted to Rs 19,232 Cr.
  • Total Assets and Total Liabilities each stood at Rs 28,390 Cr.

Financial Ratios:
  • The Basic EPS for March 2025 was Rs 218.96, and the Book Value per Share was Rs 963.60.
  • The Return on Networth / Equity was 22.71%, and the Debt to Equity ratio was 0.02.

The neutral sentiment analysis from Moneycontrol as of May 8, 2025, suggests a stable outlook on Hero Motocorp. Hero Motocorp continues to demonstrate steady financial performance, as reflected in its latest results.
